title: Research & Strategy
description: We talk to users and stakeholders alike. Combining user research with business strategy, we build the foundation for products that are desirable, viable, and feasible.
longDescription: Great products sit at the intersection of user needs, business goals, and technical feasibility. We start by deeply understanding your users — through interviews, usability tests, and UX analysis — while simultaneously aligning with your business through stakeholder workshops, value proposition design, and strategic sessions. The result is a clear product strategy and roadmap grounded in real insights, not assumptions.

title: Product Design
description: We design intuitive, beautiful interfaces — testing early with high-fidelity designs and iterating based on real user and business insight.
longDescription: Great design is invisible — it just works. We craft high-fidelity designs that look and feel like the real product, so we can test with real users early, gather meaningful feedback, and iterate fast. Every design decision is grounded in user research and business insight, so what we ship isn't just beautiful — it's validated.

title: Design Systems
description: A design system brings consistency and efficiency to your product, resulting in better user experience and brand identity.
longDescription: As products scale, inconsistency creeps in. We build comprehensive design systems — component libraries, design tokens, and documentation — that keep your product coherent and your team fast. A well-built system pays dividends for years.

title: Build MVPs
description: Quickly validate your product idea, receive feedback from users, and iterate towards a successful and sustainable solution.
longDescription: Speed to market matters. We help you define the smallest viable version of your product, design and build it rapidly, then put it in front of real users. This learn-fast approach reduces risk and ensures you're building something people actually want.

title: Boost Branding
description: We take your existing brand and integrate it meaningfully into your product — from color systems and typography to interaction patterns and motion.
longDescription: You already have a brand. We make sure your product lives up to it. We translate your existing identity into a coherent product experience — defining how your colors, typography, illustration style, and motion principles show up across every screen and interaction. Need a new logo or naming? We'll connect you with our trusted partners. Our focus is on making your brand feel alive inside your product.

title: AI Integration
description: We embed AI into your product workflows — from intelligent automation to generative features that create real user value.
longDescription: AI is transforming how products work. We help you identify where AI creates genuine value for your users — not gimmicks, but meaningful features. From smart automation to generative interfaces, we design and build AI-powered experiences that feel natural and useful.

title: Design Sprints
description: Solve big product challenges in just 4 days — from problem framing to a tested prototype with real users.
longDescription: A Design Sprint is a structured 4-day process that helps teams rapidly move from a challenge to a validated solution. We facilitate the entire sprint: mapping the problem, sketching solutions, deciding on direction, building a realistic prototype, and testing it with real users. It's the fastest way to de-risk decisions and align your team.

whenToSprint.title: Validate an idea with users
whenToSprint.description: Condense months of development into a four-day process to create and test a prototype, evaluating its effectiveness for your end users.

whenToSprint.title: Get started or get unstuck
whenToSprint.description: Tackle that lingering idea or resolve a persistent challenge by turning it into a focused, actionable project.

whenToSprint.title: Bring vision to life
whenToSprint.description: A great team is diverse and brings different perspectives. A design sprint is tailored to unite these varied visions into a cohesive plan.

whenToSprint.title: Shift to concrete outcomes
whenToSprint.description: Stop talking about ideas and start realizing them. The fast-paced design sprint is perfect for making bold, solid decisions quickly.

title: Product Foundation Sprint
description: A structured 2-day workshop to define your target customer, sharpen your value proposition, and align your team on a clear strategic direction.
longDescription: Before you build, make sure you're solving the right problem for the right people. The Foundation Sprint is a 2-day facilitated workshop that helps teams align on customer, problem, and strategy. Day one defines the fundamentals and crafts your differentiation. Day two generates multiple strategic paths and stress-tests them. You walk out with a founding hypothesis, a mini manifesto, and a clear next step.

title: UX/UI Audits
description: A thorough review of your product's user experience and interface — identifying friction, inconsistencies, and opportunities to improve.
longDescription: Sometimes you need a fresh pair of expert eyes on your product. We audit your existing experience end-to-end: evaluating usability, visual consistency, accessibility, and interaction patterns. You get a prioritized report with concrete, actionable recommendations — not vague observations, but clear steps to make your product better.

title: User Testing & Interviews
description: Put your product in front of real users. We run usability tests and in-depth interviews to uncover what works, what doesn't, and why.
longDescription: Assumptions are risky. We help you validate decisions by talking to real users. Whether it's moderated usability tests, unmoderated sessions, or in-depth interviews — we plan, recruit, facilitate, and synthesize findings into clear insights your team can act on immediately.

title: Design for Mendix
description: We design pixel-perfect interfaces optimized for Mendix — so your low-code apps look and feel like custom-built products.
longDescription: Mendix is powerful, but out-of-the-box it doesn't always deliver the experience your users deserve. We bridge that gap — designing interfaces that work seamlessly within Mendix's component architecture while pushing the visual and interaction quality far beyond standard templates. From custom design systems to production-ready themes, we make your Mendix apps shine.
